message:
feat(web): complete Terminal Noir UI/UX overhaul

Remaining changes from UI/UX redesign:
- Full globals.css design system with OKLCH color palette
- Landing page with animated terminal, cosmic backgrounds, feature cards
- Wizard layout with premium sidebar and mobile navigation
- Enhanced stepper, command cards, OS selection
- Confetti celebration on wizard completion

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
